column1: UNLIMITED BUDGET. I have lots of money in the stock market and it's GOING UP!!
A medium sized budget. I own an electronics store at the mall.
$8972 exactly!
Small budget.
I don't have much money. I just went through a divorce.
I sell snack foods from a food truck. I have a decent amount of money.
Very small budget. I got into a fight with my grandma and she wrote me out of her will.
I did a magic good luck ritual and I won the lottery the week after. I have a big budget.
My hairy brother-in-law is sponsoring this vacation. Big budget!
I've been lifting weights every day for over a year. It's time to reward myself and go all out!
I have a successful saffron business
I only want to spend $9999 anything about $10000 gets flagged with my bank.
Do you accept payment in kazoos?
My friend said he would give me $5000 if I bring his smelly cured cheeses to the destination.
I know it sounds fishy but I swear I have $50000 to spend on this trip!
After my uncle passed last year I received a large sum of money.
I hedged a huge bet on Mike Tyson absolutely destroying James Douglas
I'm the worlds leading microbiologist so as you can imagine... I'm underpaid.
I'm the assistant to the assistant to the chaffeur of the President of the United States. So not much!
I've been busking on the streets for the last three months to scrape something up.
Well unless I run into a leprechaun with a pot of gold my budget's looking pretty tight.
Umm... sorry can I use the bathroom?
This is my first holiday how much should I be spending?
I'll be eating rice beans and onions for the next month to afford this.
Well... it's going to get me in hot water with the missus but let's go big!
I've budgeted for a seventeen day affair.
